name: POST /api/ayesha/therapy-fit/bundle?level=l1&include_synthetic_lethality=true
what_it_solves: Composite therapy-fit bundle endpoint — the front-end's primary read.
how_it_solves: Live commit + response body captured in bundle_endpoint_mbd4_live.json. Top-level keys observed: ['contract_version', 'patient_id', 'requested_levels', 'generated_at', 'levels', 'tests_needed', 'patient_context', 'synthetic_lethality', 'sl_status']
why_it_exists: Single call for the clinician UI: bundles SL + safety + trials + SOC + biomarkers behind one contract.
